title: Chazayah #2382
definition:
Hazaiah = "God has seen"

 1) an exile and descendant of Shelah of the tribe of Judah who
    returned in the time of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hazaiah = "God has seen"

 1) an exile and descendant of Shelah of the tribe of Judah who
    returned in the time of Nehemiah

    NASB:  Yah has seen, a desc. of Judah
